zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Wilsone於1574年4月14日出生在蘇格蘭艾丁波時，他的父親Johne Wilsone34歲，母親Helen Purdey or Purddy23歲。他於大約1592年與Mrs. Alexander Wilsone在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Wilsone于1574年4月14日出生在苏格兰艾丁波时，他的父亲Johne Wilsone34岁，母亲Helen Purdey or Purddy23岁。他于大约1592年与Mrs. Alexander Wilsone在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Wilsone
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Will + patronymic -son ‘son of Will’. Will was a very common medieval short form of William . This surname is also very common among African Americans.

variants.name: Will
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Will, a short form of William . This surname is now commonly found in Scotland, in Aberdeenshire, Angus, and Kincardineshire.

English: topographic name for someone who lived by a spring or stream, from Middle English wel, wel(l)e, wille, in a southwestern dialect form. This surname is found predominantly in the south and southwestern parts of the country. Compare Well 1.
English: nickname from Middle English iwil, wil(l)e ‘agreeable, pleasing’.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Wilsone was born on 14 April 1574, in Edinburgh, Scotland, his father, Johne Wilsone, was 34 and his mother, Helen Purdey or Purddy, was 23. He married Mrs. Alexander Wilsone about 1592, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Wilsone est né le 14 avril 1574, à Edinburgh, Écosse, son père, Johne Wilsone, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Helen Purdey or Purddy, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Alexander Wilsone environ 1592, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Wilsone am 14. April 1574 in Edinburgh, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Johne Wilsone 34 und seine Mutter Helen Purdey or Purddy 23. Er hat um 1592 in Schottland, United Kingdom Mrs. Alexander Wilsone geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Wilsone è nato il il 14 aprile 1574 nel Edinburgh, Scotland, il suo padre, Johne Wilsone, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Helen Purdey or Purddy, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. Alexander Wilsone circa 1592, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Wilsoneが1574年4月14日にスコットランドエディンブルグで生まれた時，父Johne Wilsoneは34歳，母Helen Purdey or Purddyは23歳であった。約1592年にイギリススコットランドでMrs. Alexander Wilsoneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Wilsone(이)가 1574년 4월 14일 스컷랜드 에딘버그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Johne Wilsone(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Helen Purdey or Purddy(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1592년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Mrs. Alexander Wilsone(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Wilsone nasceu em 14 de abril de 1574, em Edinburgh, Scotland, seu pai, Johne Wilsone, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Helen Purdey or Purddy, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Alexander Wilsone aproximadamente 1592, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Wilsone родился 14 апреля 1574 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Johne Wilsone было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Helen Purdey or Purddy, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Alexander Wilsone около 1592 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander Wilsone nació el 14 de abril de 1574, en Edinburgh, Scotland, su papá, Johne Wilsone, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Helen Purdey or Purddy, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Mrs. Alexander Wilsone aproximadamente 1592, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas.
